name: li-shang-wang-lai-skills
description: A GitHub-cloneable skill pack for creator interaction workflows. It includes a comment suggestion skill and an interaction execution skill. The execution skill must use the comment suggestion skill whenever a comment draft is needed.

skills.name: creator-comment-suggestion
skills.description: Generate exactly one safe, natural Chinese comment suggestion based only on provided work context.

skills.name: creator-interaction-executor
skills.description: Execute creator interaction workflows after explicit user confirmation, including preparation, validation, liking, posting approved comments, and recording results.

dependsOn.name: creator-comment-suggestion
dependsOn.usage: Required whenever a comment draft is needed.
